comment: codeweb's own map config. roles: docs/ is the BUILT website (site/build.mjs output) — generated, not product (Spec E, docs/specs/role-overrides-self-campaign.md). spike/** and .live/** are prototype/workspace trees (finding 28): both are deleted today, but the overrides stand so a future spike or a stray workspace can never pollute the self-metrics again.
